seo.title: How He Built ₹10 Crore with Just Mutual Funds SIP
seo.description: Can you really build ₹10 Crore with just Mutual Funds and SIP? Vishesh Gandhi did exactly that, no complicated trading, no watching the stock market

takeaways.text: Vishesh Gandhi reached ₹10 crore using only mutual funds and SIPs, without complicated trading or watching the market every day.
His journey started with a simple ₹25,000 monthly SIP, proof that a fixed, manageable amount is enough to begin.
The first 6 to 7 years felt boring, and the effect of compounding only became visible later, so patience matters more than early excitement.
Step-up SIPs and plain discipline did much of the heavy lifting, meaning slowly raising your contribution counts as much as staying invested.
He treats mutual funds as the tool for core goals and keeps direct stocks, PMS, AIF and gold as separate satellite bets, reviewed with simple rules.
